name: claude-evolve
description: Evolutionary algorithm search inside Claude Code. Skills: evolve (omnibus run loop), evolve-ideate (Fable high ideation), evolve-code (codex-first coding, Opus judge/fallback), evolve-score (Haiku evaluation). Self-contained: bundles the CSV/sandbox engine (stdlib-only, no npm/pip) and runs the AI steps as Anthropic subagents.
